name: Gad Elmaleh
bio: Gad Elmaleh is a Moroccan-Canadian stand-up comedian and actor best known in the French-speaking world, often called the Seinfeld of France for his observational style. After breaking through with one-man shows in Paris in the late 1990s, he later performed in English and released stand-up specials for Netflix.

timeline.ev: Debuts first one-man show Decalages in Paris
La Vie Normale broadens his fame, first Olympia run
Named knight of the Ordre des Arts et des Lettres
Releases French Netflix special Gad Gone Wild
Releases first English special American Dream

accolades: Voted the funniest person in France
Knight of the Ordre des Arts et des Lettres (2006)
Member of the National Order of Quebec (2017)
